ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the bioinformatics task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the task is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the task */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the variable is associated with */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the variable */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the variable is required */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the variable is sensitive */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variable was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variable was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the variable */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pipeline_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the pipeline run started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the pipeline run ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pipeline run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the pipeline run failed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who initiated the pipeline run */,
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the pipeline */,
  "total_tasks" INTEGER /* Total number of tasks in the pipeline run */,
  "completed_tasks" INTEGER /* Number of tasks completed in the pipeline run */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Total elapsed time for the pipeline run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pipeline run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pipeline run was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipeline_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_task_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task configuration */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipeline run */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value assigned to the variable for this pipeline run */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the configuration is the default for the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_task_configurations_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_task_configurations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_task_configurations_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES pipeline_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_task_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_task_configurations_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
